name: nature-skills
description: Marketplace hosting the nature-skills plugin — a Nature-style academic research toolkit (literature search, citation, figures, writing, polishing, peer-review, response letters, paper-to-PPT/patent).

plugins.name: nature-skills
plugins.description: Nature-style academic research toolkit. Bundles every skill under skills/nature-*/SKILL.md plus skills/_shared. Use for literature search, citations, publication figures, manuscript drafting/polishing, peer-review simulation, response letters, full-text readers, and paper-to-PPT/patent conversion.
